title: First Light Visual Contract Record
visual_rule: Render 3 larger visible slots/windows: India, Northeast Watch, World.
data_rule: Retain 10 underlying signals for future AI/admin selection.

card_sizing_rule.width: full available First Light card width
card_sizing_rule.purpose: Give enough visible space for transition movement and readable signal summaries.

transition_rule.effect: opacity and vertical translate transition between underlying signals

lane_contract.behaviour: Show Northeast Watch signal window; transition-ready if more items are added later.

future_state: same three-lane layout should render real reviewed daily signals after source/AI/admin activation.
